title: Cross-Track Finding
description: A single research finding produced by one multi-track research run. Files live at {cache_root}/cross-track-{run_id}/track-{track_id}.json (array of these objects per track). Used by scripts/cross_track_aggregator.py to detect convergence across tracks.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for the run, e.g. 'multi-track-2026-05-08' or 'swarm-intel-deep-2026-06-01'.

track_id.description: Single uppercase letter identifying the track within this run.

finding_id.description: 8-character lowercase hex hash. Generate with hashlib.sha256(content).hexdigest()[:8]

finding_type.description: Finding category. One of decision, pattern, gotcha, solution.

content.description: Full text. Used for keyword-overlap convergence detection.

layer.description: System layer per architecture.md Integration Matrix.
